greetings.cold: Mr. Gibbons. The usual, no conversation. Understood.
greetings.neutral: Mr. Gibbons. Sit. The kettle was just thinking about you.
greetings.warm: Gary. Your cup's already pulled. It knew before I did.

etiquette.note: Speaks in coffee metaphors. Keeps a bowl of grapes on the counter — Gary's personal Everest.
